title: <div><i>A teenage dog-walker sets out on a dark and surreal journey to discover
content:
A teenage dog-walker sets out on a dark and surreal journey to discover the murderer of her only friend, and in doing so also discovers her voice for the first time amidst South Florida’s opioid crisis.
It’s Clue, meets Big Fish, meets Lady Bird.

A broken family dead set on going their separate ways in a technologically advanced suburbia are locked inside their house by a pirate hacker broadcasting the families meltdown publicly and making them bloody victims of their own devices.
It’s Ex Machina, meets The Thing, meets Scream.

Hi Sonny,
Hope the week is going well. I’ve got a mystery/magical realism spec that I think you’d be into because of your love for Tim Burton.
A teenage dog-walker sets out on a dark and magical journey to discover the murderer of her only friend, and in doing so also discovers her voice for the first time amidst South Florida’s opioid crisis.
It’s Clue, meets Big Fish, meets Lady Bird.
Would love to have you take a look at it. Thanks so much and let me know.
Best,
Anthony Padavano
